name: Trivial Pursuit: Genus Edition
description: Trivial Pursuit is the classic trivia race for the round-table — players move around a hexagonal board, answering questions in six categories: Geography, Entertainment, History, Art & Literature, Science & Nature, and Sports & Leisure. Land on a wedge space, answer correctly, and earn a colored pie wedge for your token. The first player to collect all six wedges and answer a final question wins. The 1981 original launched a global trivia obsession and still rewards anyone who hoards useless facts.
